Coach's note for grown-ups Always supervise. Bodyweight only — no added weight at this age. Form beats reps: stop a set the moment it gets sloppy, and stop the session before he's worn out. Aim for 2–3 short sessions a week with a rest day between, and keep it fun. This supports his hockey; it never replaces free play and skating.
Go Rockets!
